violations.claim: Bug at line 65: If declares.length=0 AND defineFuns.length=0, returns false
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P6 - Boundary Analysis
; LINE: 59
; Bug at line 65: If declares.length=0 AND defineFuns.length=0, returns false
; Counterexample: SMT2 with no variables but trivial asserts like (= 1 1)

(declare-const num_declares Int)
(declare-const num_defines Int)
(declare-const num_asserts Int)

; Case: No variables declared, but has an assertion like (assert (= 1 1))
(assert (= num_declares 0))
(assert (= num_defines 0))
(assert (= num_asserts 1))

; Code path: lines 65-66 check (declares.length === 0 && defineFuns.length === 0)
; Since both are 0, returns false (not vacuous)
; But formula is vacuous because it has no variables to constrain
(assert (and (= num_declares 0) (= num_defines 0)))
(check-sat)

(assert (and (= num_declares 0) (= num_defines 0)))
